name: Dad Joke Video Generation
description: Daily automated dad joke video pipeline - fetches joke from Dadabase, generates assets, renders video, uploads to MinIO, sends for approval
deliverables: MP4 video rendered with Remotion, uploaded to MinIO (hp1/dadjokes/{id}/), Dadabase marked Used=TRUE, approval message sent to Kevin via Telegram
validation_criteria: Video file exists at MinIO path: hp1/dadjokes/{id}/{id}-video-V1.mp4
Video displays correct joke text (Georgia serif font, no 'I' vs 'J' confusion)
Audio padded with 1s start/end buffers (total ~5.7s for 3.7s joke)
Background image generated by SD (no text, colorful cartoon style)
Approval message sent to telegram:8177470832 with video attached
Assets uploaded: background.png, audio.mp3, video.mp4 to MinIO bucket
